RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT MARCUS LANCE'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendant IS DENIED.
DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO ANSWER. Plaintiff's counsel to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DS)
